nasb.text: The righteous is concerned for the rights of the poor, The wicked does not understand such concern.

esv.text: A righteous man knows the rights of the poor; a wicked man does not understand such knowledge.

cnv.text: 義人關注窮人的冤情； 惡人卻不分辨實情。

ccb.text: 义人关心穷人的冤屈， 恶人对此漠不关心。

csbs.text: 义人明白贫弱者的争讼， 恶人却无知、不能领悟。
